title: Skill Authoring Rules + Contribute & Edit Workflow
desc: [RULE] ALL skill content (title/desc/steps/tags) MUST be in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. Create, update, and partially edit wkappbot skills. contribute = create or full-update. edit = partial update (title/desc/tags/steps only). Auto version-bumped on every save.
steps:
0. [RULE] Write ALL skill content in English only -- Korean wastes 2-3x tokens and bloats context for every AI reading the skill.
1. CREATE: wkappbot skill contribute --app X --title "Title" --desc "Desc" --steps "s1
as step separator in --steps. Do NOT use

inside step text -- it will be split as a new step.
2. UPDATE (full): wkappbot skill contribute --app X --title "..." --desc "..." --id existing-id
3. EDIT title: wkappbot skill edit <id> --title "New Title" (other fields preserved)
4. EDIT desc: wkappbot skill edit <id> --desc "New description"
5. EDIT steps: wkappbot skill edit <id> --steps "step1

step3"
6. RENAME slug: wkappbot skill delete <old-id> && contribute --id <new-slug> ...
7. VERIFY refs: wkappbot skill verify <id>
8. AUDIT all: wkappbot skill audit
9. Auto-install: skills/ -> HQ on every publish (skill install runs in build)
NEVER: Do NOT edit .skill.json files directly with Edit/Write tools. Reasons: (1)
in content splits steps wrongly, (2) unicode escapes corrupt Korean, (3) version bump skipped, (4) source_refs schema differs. ALWAYS use skill contribute or skill edit commands.
author: claude
